value.string: Bot Built by :- Predikly Technology Pvt. Ltd.

This sub bot is
used to automate google sheet functionality. It uses google Sheets as input and
performs arithmetic operations on data retrieved from google Sheets. After
the arithmetic operation bot will write updated data to other google sheets.

Note:- Create project in
Google console,
After creation
of project, user will get a Client ID and Client Secret Key. These key values we
need to use in AA Task bot to connect to G-Drive.
For this Please refer the Document -  Creating Project for GSuite Automation

value.expression:
Define the input variable and its use, e.g., see below
$iStrProjectFolder$ = is a given path of Project folder to store all the data related this process

Pass the input parameters ie. 
$iStrClientId$ = Client Id which you receive after creating the project in the Google console
$iStrClientSecret$ =  Client secret which you receive after creating the project in Google console
$iStrEmailID$ = Pass the Email id which is associated with the Client Id and Client Secret key
$iStrInputSheetUrl$ = Url of the input file
$iStrOutputSheetUrl$ = Url of the output file

value.string: REQUIRED: Fill in the Bot Name and Vendor Name fields in the lines below . These values are used for logging purposes.
Verify Bot Name and Vendor Name

Bot Name and Vendor Name will drive logging - and are required to be filled. Additionaly, these values should be passed to a subtask (if subtasks are expected) or passed from a parent task if this bot will be called as a subtask.
Bot Name and Vendor Name are required values - please provide their values using the value assignments on the preceding lines.
Assigned values to Variables and create required files and folders
Setting lookback period for how long to keep logs for. Default is 30, can be customized as desired.
Surrounding delete actions in try handlers as to not cause the bot to fail its run in the case a log file couldnt be deleted.
Deleting folder from logs folder older than nLoggingPeriod days since last modification
Which contains the Audit log file, Error log files and Snapshot folder
There and 3 different ways to open the sheet amog this Three . Two of them have been used in this code
The Spreadsheet ID is the last string of characters in the URL for your spreadsheet.
The Spreadsheet ID is unique for every url
If you want to use Spreadsheet id code please enable this part of the code and disable the Open sheet from the URL code
Read Employee Details from G-Sheet(Input File)

variables.name: pStrBotName

variables.description: REQUIRED: Vendor Name as listed in Bot Store submission
